name: Crockpot Southwestern Beef & Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Salt pork, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried pinto beans in water overnight.
2. Brown the salt pork in a skillet; remove and drain off any excess fat using paper towels.
3. In the slow-cooking pot, combine the soaked beans (with their soaking water), browned pork, and remaining ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour.
5. Reduce heat to low and continue cooking for an additional 8 to 9 hours.
